name: Story of Suzaku

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Flare Feather
actions.effects: Target gains a Burning token, then place it anywhere within 3" of its current location.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Ember Rush
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Enemy models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Story of New Strength
actions.effects: Remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: Dark Remedy
triggers.text: This model or the target heals 2.

actions.name: The Wind's Wrath
actions.effects: Move models within (t)3" of this model 1".

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Story of Suzaku' back='Suzaku'
Title mismatch: front='None' back='Story of Suzaku'
